name: claude-session-title
description: Auto-name every Claude Code session: on the first prompt, Haiku summarizes your request into a kebab-case title and the session pill renames itself.

plugins.name: session-title
plugins.description: UserPromptSubmit hook that synchronously calls Haiku on the first prompt of each session and emits a kebab-case title via hookSpecificOutput.sessionTitle. One-shot per session (marker-file guarded), recursion-safe, 20s timeout with a slugified-prompt fallback. ~9s added to prompt 1; zero overhead after.
